title: Planning and Decision-Making Process: Campus-Level
description: Each campus in Conroe ISD maintains a shared decision-making team made up of teachers, parents, community members, and campus leaders who work together to guide school planning and improvement. These teams help shape decisions about instruction, school programs, and how resources are used at the campus level. Parents and community members have a meaningful role in this process, giving families a direct voice in how their local school operates.
description_local: This policy governs how the school district creates and updates its annual District Improvement Plan, a required roadmap that outlines goals and strategies for improving student performance and overall school quality. It applies to the entire district, guiding decisions made by school leaders, staff, and the school board each year. Parents and community members should care about this policy because the improvement plan shapes priorities for how schools are run, where resources are directed, and how the district works toward better outcomes for all students.
